channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro is now live 🚀🚀
We’ve pushed image quality, multilingual text rendering, and inst...
item.description:
Qwen-Image-2.0-Pro is now live 🚀🚀
We’ve pushed image quality, multilingual text rendering, and instruction following to a new level, while making performance much more consistent across styles.🌅🌃
Ranked #9 worldwide for Text-to-Image on @arena
🔗Try it now on ModelScope: https://t.co/pPtrbjzzBK https://t.co/raB6WWMEMP API：https://t.co/EgYS5qt2bF
--- @Alibaba_Qwen | ❤️ 43 | 🔁 6 | 💬 6 | 👁 1475
item.author: @Alibaba_Qwen

#HealthTech #Tec...
item.description:
Precision Perfected: How #Robotic Surgery Eliminates Human Tremors by @sciencegirl

--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 66
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title: 我才意识到 wanman 创建 sandbox 是没有预热池的，因为自定义镜像不会命中 sandbank 的预热池。但是就算是冷启动，也可以说是非常快了，远比一众流行的 sandbox provide...
item.author: @turingou

item.title: RT @paulg: Whoah, self-driving cars compete with airlines. I never considered that till now.
item.author: @elonmusk

item.title: RT @tetsuoai: grok imagine is on another level now. the new model is unreal. go try it.
item.author: @elonmusk
